verdict_reason: Cross-tag coherence: 2.43's tags (vanity-metrics, operator-system-coupling, fruits-of-action) are coherent with 2.47's (shipping-discipline, outcome-detachment) and 2.48's (operator-system-coupling, incident-response). 2.43 names the constitutive-shift that 2.47 corrects with 'your right is to the action, not to the fruits' and 2.48 corrects with samatvam (evenness). All three verses anchor in the same karma-yoga doctrine: action is real, fruits are not under the operator's authorship, identity should not restructure around the fruit-loop. Cross-references in source pack (to 2.42 syntactic continuation, to 2.44 consequence clause) all resolve and support the citing claims. PASS for both 6.1 and 6.5.
